changes.title: 1980s Arcade Theme
changes.description: Complete visual overhaul with retro pixel arcade aesthetic. Deep purple background, cyber cyan accents, and hot pink highlights.

changes.title: CRT Screen Emulation
changes.description: Added authentic CRT scanline effects and screen curvature using pure CSS.

changes.title: Pixel Font Typography
changes.description: Blocky monospace fonts (Press Start 2P) for that authentic 8-bit arcade look.

changes.title: Neon Glow Effects
changes.description: Text shadows and glowing effects on all interactive elements.

changes.title: 8-bit Pixel Borders
changes.description: Pixelated border styles for cards and buttons.

changes.title: Arcade Color Palette
changes.description: New color scheme with Deep Purple, Arcade Purple, Hot Pink, Cyber Cyan, Neon Green, Radical Orange.
